providers.purpose: Customer email, quote send, invoice send, receipt, delivery, and follow-up
providers.exactConnectionStep: Choose the production email provider, create or approve the sending account/domain, add the provider credentials only in the private runtime secret store, then run the provider success, failure, duplicate, timeout, and uncertain-result tests before owner release.

providers.purpose: Provider-hosted payment links, deposits, progress/final billing, recurring billing, receipts, credits, and refunds
providers.exactConnectionStep: Choose and approve a provider-hosted payment service, complete the provider business/account review, store test credentials privately, run hosted-link and webhook tests with no raw card data, then separately store production credentials and require owner release for each external payment action.

providers.purpose: Chart mapping, exports, reconciliation, balances, cash view, expenses, profitability, and attribution
providers.exactConnectionStep: Approve the chart-of-accounts mapping and opening-balance method; continue using the verified CSV export until an accounting provider is selected, authorized, and tested in a private sandbox.

providers.purpose: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Google Business Profile, and YouTube scheduling, publishing proof, performance, and inquiry routing
providers.exactConnectionStep: Confirm ownership/admin access for each approved platform account, repair or replace the scheduler connection, store credentials privately, map each account, then run one selected-record test post per platform before owner release.

providers.purpose: Rollback-protected website deployment and exact deployment health
providers.exactConnectionStep: Create a rollback reference, pass repository and live acceptance checks, then obtain the owner's explicit release for the selected deployment record; never deploy a different or bulk record.

providers.purpose: Secure customer portal authentication and customer-own authorization
providers.exactConnectionStep: Select the customer authentication and private storage providers, configure a test tenant, pass cross-customer isolation and revocation tests, and obtain owner release before any customer record is exposed.
